codeReview.summary: Implementation provides version history tracking and rollback capability for memory entries. The feature adds MemoryVersion struct, RollbackAuditEntry for audit trail, RollbackResult for operation results, and comprehensive methods for version management. All 10 tests pass, clippy passes with no warnings, and build succeeds.

sharedStateObservations.observation: The worker followed the Rust skill correctly, producing idiomatic async Rust code with proper error handling via the SwellError type. No deviations from skill procedure were noted.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: Transcript shows standard Rust async patterns with sqlx, proper Result return types, and error mapping throughout.

summary: Feature implementation reviewed. Code is well-structured with proper version history tracking, rollback capability, and audit trail. All verification steps pass (build, clippy, tests). No blocking issues found.
